lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਜਗਦੀਸੁਰ ਪੇਖਤ ਸਦਾ ਹਜੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: man tan rav rahiaa jagadeesur pekhat sadaa hajoore |
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe is permeating and pervading my mind and body; I see Him Ever-present, here and now.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਓ ਸਭ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਰਬ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਰਪੂਰੇ ॥੨॥੮॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: naanak rav rahio sabh antar sarab rahiaa bharapoore |2|8|12|
lines.english: O Nanak, He is permeating the inner being of all; He is all-pervading everywhere. ||2||8||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: malaar mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Malaar, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਭਜਨਿ ਕਉਨ ਕਉਨ ਨ ਤਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har kai bhajan kaun kaun na taare |
lines.english: Vibrating and meditating on the Lord, who has not been carried across?

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵ ਕੁਲ ਦੈਤ ਕੁਲ ਜਖੵ ਕਿੰਨਰ ਨਰ ਸਾਗਰ ਉਤਰੇ ਪਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: dev kul dait kul jakhay kinar nar saagar utare paare |
lines.english: The families of gods, the families of demons, titans, celestial singers and human beings are carried across the ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਗ ਤਨ ਮੀਨ ਤਨ ਮ੍ਰਿਗ ਤਨ ਬਰਾਹ ਤਨ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਉਧਾਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: khag tan meen tan mrig tan baraah tan saadhoo sang udhaare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Those reborn into the body of a bird, the body of a fish, the body of a deer, and the body of a bull - in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, they are saved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕਰੋਧ ਮਹਾ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਰਸ ਇਨ ਤੇ ਭਏ ਨਿਰਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kaam karodh mahaa bikhiaa ras in te bhe niraare |
lines.english: Sexual desire, anger and the pleasures of terrible corruption - he keeps away from these.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਭਜਨੁ ਕਰੈ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਤਾ ਕੇ ਦੂਖ ਬਿਦਾਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jo jo bhajan karai saadhoo sang taa ke dookh bidaare |1|
lines.english: Whoever meditates and vibrates on the Lord in the Saadh Sangat - his pains are taken away. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਜਪਹਿ ਕਰੁਣਾ ਮੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੇ ॥੨॥੯॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: deen deaal japeh karunaa mai naanak sad balihaare |2|9|13|
lines.english: He meditates on the Lord, Merciful to the meek, the Embodiment of Compassion; Nanak is forever a sacrifice to Him. ||2||9||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਰਾਸਿ ਸਾਝੀ ਕਰਿ ਜਨ ਸਿਉ ਜਾਂਉ ਨ ਜਮ ਕੈ ਘਾਟ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam raas saajhee kar jan siau jaanau na jam kai ghaatt |1| rahaau |
lines.english: With the wealth of the Lord, I have entered into partnership with the humble; I shall not have take the Highway of Death. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਜੁ ਮੈ ਬੈਸਿਓ ਹਰਿ ਹਾਟ ॥
lines.translit: aaj mai baisio har haatt |
lines.english: Today, I am seated in the Lord's store.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: malaar mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Malaar, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਸੁਮਾਰ ਸਾਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਲਾਹਾ ਚਰਨ ਨਿਧਿ ਖਾਟ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: besumaar saahu prabh paaeaa laahaa charan nidh khaatt |1|
lines.english: I have found God, the Banker of Infinity; I have earned the profit of the wealth of His Feet. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਰਿ ਅਨੁਗ੍ਰਹੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਭ੍ਰਮ ਕੇ ਖੁਲੑੇ ਕਪਾਟ ॥
lines.translit: dhaar anugrahu paarabraham raakhe bhram ke khulae kapaatt |
lines.english: Showering me with His Kindness, the Supreme Lord God has saved me; the doors of doubt have been opened wide.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਨਿ ਗਹੀ ਅਚੁਤ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਕਾਢੇ ਹੈ ਛਾਂਟਿ ॥
lines.translit: saran gahee achut abinaasee kilabikh kaadte hai chhaantt |
lines.english: I have grasped the protection of the Sanctuary of the Unchanging, Unmoving, Imperishable Lord; He has picked up my sins and thrown them out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਕਲੇਸ ਮਿਟੇ ਦਾਸ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਜੋਨੀ ਮਾਟ ॥੨॥੧੦॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: kal kales mitte daas naanak bahur na jonee maatt |2|10|14|
lines.english: Slave Nanak's sorrow and suffering has ended. He shall never again be squeezed into the mold of reincarnation. ||2||10||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਹਿਰਾਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: bahu bidh maaeaa moh hiraano |
lines.english: In so many ways, attachment to Maya leads to ruin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: malaar mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Malaar, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਮਧੇ ਕੋਊ ਬਿਰਲਾ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਪੂਰਨ ਭਗਤੁ ਚਿਰਾਨੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kott madhe koaoo biralaa sevak pooran bhagat chiraano |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Among millions, it is very rare to find a selfless servant who remains a perfect devotee for very long. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਤ ਉਤ ਡੋਲਿ ਡੋਲਿ ਸ੍ਰਮੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਤਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਹੋਤ ਬਿਰਾਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: eit ut ddol ddol sram paaeo tan dhan hot biraano |
lines.english: Roaming and wandering here and there, the mortal finds only trouble; his body and wealth become strangers to himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਗ ਦੁਰਾਇ ਕਰਤ ਠਗਿਆਈ ਹੋਤੌ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਜਾਨੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: log duraae karat tthagiaaee hotau sang na jaano |1|
lines.english: Hiding from people, he practices deception; he does not know the One who is always with him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮ੍ਰਿਗ ਪੰਖੀ ਮੀਨ ਦੀਨ ਨੀਚ ਇਹ ਸੰਕਟ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: mrig pankhee meen deen neech ih sankatt fir aano |
lines.english: He wanders through troubled incarnations of low and wretched species as a deer, a bird and a fish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਾਹਨ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤਾਰਹੁ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਸੁਖ ਮਾਨੋ ॥੨॥੧੧॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak paahan prabh taarahu saadhasangat sukh maano |2|11|15|
lines.english: Says Nanak, O God, I am a stone - please carry me across, that I may enjoy peace in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||2||11||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਸਟ ਮੁਏ ਬਿਖੁ ਖਾਈ ਰੀ ਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: dusatt mue bikh khaaee ree maaee |
lines.english: The cruel and evil ones died after taking poison, O mother.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੇ ਜੀਅ ਤਿਨ ਹੀ ਰਖਿ ਲੀਨੇ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਉ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਆਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jis ke jeea tin hee rakh leene mere prabh kau kirapaa aaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: And the One, to whom all creatures belong, has saved us. God has granted His Grace. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: malaar mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Malaar, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਵਰਤੈ ਤਾਂ ਭਉ ਕੈਸਾ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: antarajaamee sabh meh varatai taan bhau kaisaa bhaaee |
lines.english: The Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts, is contained within all; why should I be afraid, O Siblings of Destiny?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਗਿ ਸਹਾਈ ਛੋਡਿ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਦੀਸੈ ਸਭਨੀ ਠਾਈਁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sang sahaaee chhodd na jaaee prabh deesai sabhanee tthaaee |1|
lines.english: God, my Help and Support, is always with me. He shall never leave; I see Him everywhere. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਾਥਾ ਨਾਥੁ ਦੀਨ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨ ਆਪਿ ਲੀਏ ਲੜਿ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: anaathaa naath deen dukh bhanjan aap lee larr laaee |
lines.english: He is the Master of the masterless, the Destroyer of the pains of the poor; He has attached me to the hem of His robe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਓਟ ਜੀਵਹਿ ਦਾਸ ਤੇਰੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥੨॥੧੨॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: har kee ott jeeveh daas tere naanak prabh saranaaee |2|12|16|
lines.english: O Lord, Your slaves live by Your Support; Nanak has come to the Sanctuary of God. ||2||12||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: malaar mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Malaar, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਰਵੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: man mere har ke charan raveejai |
lines.english: O my mind, dwell on the Feet of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸ ਪਿਆਸ ਮੇਰੋ ਮਨੁ ਮੋਹਿਓ ਹਰਿ ਪੰਖ ਲਗਾਇ ਮਿਲੀਜੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: daras piaas mero man mohio har pankh lagaae mileejai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: My mind is enticed by thirst for the Blessed Vision of the Lord; I would take wings and fly out to meet Him. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਜਤ ਖੋਜਤ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੇਵ ਕਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: khojat khojat maarag paaeo saadhoo sev kareejai |
lines.english: Searching and seeking, I have found the Path, and now I serve the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਰਿ ਅਨੁਗ੍ਰਹੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਮੇਰੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਹਾ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਜੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dhaar anugrahu suaamee mere naam mahaa ras peejai |1|
lines.english: O my Lord and Master, please be kind to me, that I may drink in Your most sublime essence. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੁ ਗਹਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਦਾਸ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਕਉ ਨਾਨਕ ਅਪੁਨੋ ਕੀਜੈ ॥੨॥੧੩॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: kar geh lehu daas apune kau naanak apuno keejai |2|13|17|
lines.english: Please give me Your Hand - I am Your slave, O Lord. Please make Nanak Your Own. ||2||13||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਾਹਿ ਤ੍ਰਾਹਿ ਕਰਿ ਸਰਨੀ ਆਏ ਜਲਤਉ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: traeh traeh kar saranee aae jaltau kirapaa keejai |
lines.english: Begging and pleading, I have come to Your Sanctuary; I am on fire - please shower me with Your Mercy!
